App.title: WelderDoc
App.placeholder: Application bootstrap in progress — foundation ready.

project.editor_pending_message: Your document was loaded, but the editor UI is not yet wired up.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your email and password to continue.
login.resend_verification_sent: We sent a new link to your email.

signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.subtitle: Sign up to save your projects in the cloud.
signUp.consent_tos_label: I accept the Terms of Service

checkEmail.title: Check your inbox
checkEmail.subtitle_with_email: We've sent an activation link to {email}. Click the link to finish signing up.
checkEmail.subtitle_generic: We've sent an activation link to your email. Click the link to finish signing up.
checkEmail.spam_hint: Don't see it? Check your spam folder.
checkEmail.resend_sent: We sent a new link to your email.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter the email tied to your account — we'll send a link to set a new password.
forgotPassword.sent_generic: If this email is registered, we've sent a reset link. Don't forget to check your Spam folder.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password twice to confirm the change.

consent.required_subtitle: To continue, please accept the updated terms of service and privacy policy (version {version}).
consent.tos_label: I accept the Terms of Service

errors.email_not_confirmed: Please confirm your email address before signing in.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please try again in a moment.
errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.network_error: Connection problem. Check your internet and try again.
errors.resend_session_lost: Registration session expired. Please sign up again to receive the link.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.guest_migration_failed: We couldn't migrate your guest project.
errors.guest_migration_limit: You've reached the Free plan project limit — your guest project stayed in the browser.
errors.project_limit_exceeded: You've reached the Free plan project limit.
errors.document_payload_too_large: The project is too large to save.
errors.document_data_shape_invalid: Project data has an invalid format.
errors.consent_target_unauthorized: You are not authorized to record this consent.
errors.missing_fields: Please fill in all required fields.
errors.internal_error: Server error. Please try again in a moment.
errors.consent_failed: We couldn't save your consent. Please try again.
errors.consent_required: Please accept all required consents to create an account.
errors.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.sign_out_failed: Could not sign out. Please try again.
errors.callback_failed: Authentication link has expired or has already been used. Try signing in or request a new link.

toasts.guest_migrated: Your guest project has been migrated to the cloud.
toasts.guest_migration_limit: Your guest project was not migrated — Free plan limit.
toasts.guest_migration_failed: We couldn't migrate your guest project.

dashboard.title: Your projects
dashboard.empty_state: You don't have any projects yet. Click "New project" to get started.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.subtitle: This action cannot be undone. All your projects and personal data will be permanently deleted under GDPR art. 17.

account_deleted.title: Account deleted
account_deleted.subtitle: All your personal data has been permanently erased. Thanks for using WelderDoc.
